mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate signals easier discounting and lower real-financing pressure, which lifts equity valuations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS declines are followed by negative 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of rolling 3-year triggered observations, or if walk-forward Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates above a short-run threshold, the market prices tighter future policy and lower terminal multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-threshold episodes are not followed by negative 20-day SPX returns in at least 55% of cases, or if the conditional average return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE combined with slowing PAYEMS indicates labor-market deterioration and weaker expected household income, which reduces equity demand and generates negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint UNRATE-PAYEMS signal does not improve predictive power versus each series alone, or if triggered observations produce positive 20-day returns in more than 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized expansion in RSAFS and HOUST captures broad final demand and housing activity, which supports revenue expectations and yields positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both rise on a 3-month moving-average basis
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous upswings in RSAFS and HOUST are not followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in at least 60% of triggered windows, or if the interaction term adds no incremental predictive value.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in INDPRO above its recent baseline signals stronger industrial supply utilization and a healthier cyclical earnings backdrop, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if above-threshold INDPRO increases are not followed by positive 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the short-horizon hit rate falls below 55% in rolling evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: A steady or falling UNRATE during a tightening cycle signals labor resilience despite higher policy rates, which supports risk appetite and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE/high-FEDFUNDS regime is not associated with positive 20-day SPX returns, or if the signal underperforms the unconditional benchmark over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-inflation-disinflation regime, accelerating real activity in GDPC1 supports earnings growth and multiple stability, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if above-threshold GDPC1 growth fails to precede positive 60-day SPX returns in at least 55% of observations, or if the conditional mean return is not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL stays elevated while FEDFUNDS remains restrictive, real rates and valuation pressure stay high, so S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days are negative.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation above 3% and FEDFUNDS above 4.5%
failure_condition: Reject if the high-inflation/high-rate regime does not produce negative 5-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if the interaction effect is not statistically distinguishable from zero.
